sourceAmbiguity: Home-to-detail navigation could lose selected filter, row focus, or return anchor on browser back and refresh.
decisionTaken: Persist PatientRequestReturnBundle in session storage and restore the exact request row focus when returning to `/portal/requests`.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Same-shell recovery preserves selected anchor and avoids generic home redirects while continuity evidence remains recoverable.
operationalRisk: External identity or release changes could invalidate the bundle.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Downgrade in place to bounded recovery when a future consistency projection marks the bundle stale.
